case_title: HOMECARE PROFESSIONALS, INC. VS. ELEANOR E. LEFFERTS

docket_entries.description: ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT LEFFERTS, ELEANOR E.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,020.00 FILED BY HOMECARE PROFESSIONALS, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT LEFFERTS, ELEANOR E. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-12-2013 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF HOMECARE PROFESSIONALS, INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HOMECARE PROFESSIONALS, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LEFFERTS, ELEANOR E. $2,400.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,450.00, 16 DAYS AT $150 PER DAY. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE MICHAEL L. MAU. FILED BY HOMECARE PROFESSIONALS, INC. LEFFERTS, ELEANOR E.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-12-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-12-2013 BY JUDGE PRO TEM MICHAEL L. MAU. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY ANDREW HOWARD--CEO & FOUNDER. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHAEL L. MAU. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-12-2013 - JUDGMENT.
